zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Bures II於1426年出生在英國英格蘭艾可福可亞特時，他的父親William De Bures I32歲，母親Elizabeth de Ros22歲。他和Lady Joan Markham至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1486年在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bures
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Czech and Slovak Milan, Jaroslav.
Czech and Slovak (Bureš): from a pet form of the old personal name Burian .
English (Essex): habitational name from Mount Bures (Essex) and adjacent Bures Saint Mary (Suffolk), both meaning ‘the cottages’, from Old English būr, plural būras.

variants.name: Burian
meanings: Czech and Slovak (also Burián); Hungarian (Burián); Polish and Romanian: from Burian, Burián, an old personal name apparently composed of bur ‘peasant’, a word of German origin (see Bauer and Bur ), and the name Jan (Slovak Ján) ‘John’. In Czech, the name Burian or Bur Jan denotes Saint John, a Christian martyr who lived in the 4th century in Rome and is venerated together with Saint Paul. Compare German Burhans and the name below.
North German: variant of   Burhans  , formed with the personal name   Jan   ‘John’ in place of its cognate   Hans  .

variants.name: Buresh
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Bureš (see Bures ) and of their Germanized form Buresch (compare 2 below).

Americanized form of German (of Slavic origin) Buresch: from a short form of an Old Slavic personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, derived from buriti se ‘to stir up’ + slav, from slava ‘glory’). See also 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Bures II was born in 1426, in Foxearth, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Bures I, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth de Ros, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Joan Markham. He died in 1486, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Bures IIが1426年にイギリスイギリスエセックスフォクセアルスで生まれた時，父William De Bures Iは32歳，母Elizabeth de Rosは22歳であった。彼はLady Joan Markhamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1486年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Bures II(이)가 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 폭세아르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Bures I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ros(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Lady Joan Markham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Bures II родился в 1426 г. в местности фоксирт, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Bures I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ros, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Lady Joan Markham. Он умер в 1486 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
